callGraph.callee:
`
${bodyHtml}
Family Events
${escapeHtml(heading)}
${escapeHtml(tagline)}
${footerHtml}
FAMILY EVENTS
`.trim

supabase
    .from("event_tag_queue")
    .update({
      status: resolveCompletedTagQueueStatus(),
      finished_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      last_error: null,
    })
    .eq

supabase
      .from("event_tag_queue")
      .update({
        status: "dead",
        finished_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        last_error: errMsg.slice(0, 1000),
      })
      .eq

supabase
    .from("event_tag_queue")
    .update({
      status: "pending",
      started_at: null,
      next_attempt_at: nextAttemptAt,
      last_error: errMsg.slice(0, 1000),
    })
    .eq

functions.name: buildActionEmailHtml
params:
{
  username,
  intro,
  actionLabel,
  actionUrl,
  heading,
  tagline,
}

callGraph.callee:
`
Family Events
${escapeHtml(displayHeading)}
${escapeHtml(displayTagline)}
Hi ${escapeHtml(username)},
${escapeHtml(intro)}
${escapeHtml(actionLabel)}
If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
FAMILY EVENTS
`.trim

` ${eventCount} family events this week in ${cityName}
Family Events
Your Weekly Digest
${eventCount} ${eventLabel} this week in ${cityName}
Hi ${username},
Here are the upcoming family-friendly events near you this week — curated for your neighborhood and ready to add to the weekend plan.
${eventsHtml}
Browse all events →
You're receiving this because you enabled digest emails.
Manage preferences
FAMILY EVENTS · ${cityName}
`.trim
